recs.s: URGENT: Avenger workflow's container ships with Go 1.24.13 but go.mod requires 1.26.3, AND golangci-lint is not installed. Agent burns 25 turns then hits max_turns ($1+/run wasted, 100% fail). Fix options: (1) pre-install correct Go and golangci-lint in pre-agent setup step, (2) bind-mount /opt/hostedtoolcache/go/1.26.3 into sandbox PATH by default, or (3) run `make deps-dev` in the workflow's setup. Also consider raising max_turns from 25 to 40 for Avenger so tool-discovery failures don't compound.

Squid container unhealthy in 2 sandbox starts today. Check squid healthcheck command/timing, container image freshness, and whether other failures share host pressure. Add a short retry on squid start in awf bootstrap; if it persists beyond today, the squid base image may need rebuilding.

CARRY: Codex still failing. Error shape changed today (was: model gpt-5.5 not found / OPENAI_API_KEY unset; now: stream_options.include_usage rejected). Likely a CLI/API version drift. Pin codex-cli to a known-good version OR set proxy to accept stream_options.include_usage. Also confirm `gpt-5.5` is the intended model id — appears invented; pin to a real ID (gpt-5, gpt-5-turbo, etc.).
Smoke CI cancellations down 67% (3→1). Likely concurrency-superseded by faster pushes. Acceptable as long as the trend stays low; revisit only if it spikes again.

CELEBRATE: Both 05-23 critical issues resolved by copilot CLI 1.0.48→1.0.52 upgrade. Confirm rollout is repository-wide (not just one runner) and pin 1.0.52 as a known-good minimum so we don't regress.
CARRY: Daily Safe Output Tool Optimizer remains expensive (~5-6M tokens, 13 min). Continue prompt trimming; targets 5M tokens or under 10 min.
CARRY: Variance 0-49 turns persists but no longer fatal. Re-evaluate cause now that harness fixes have landed — drift may be PR-content-driven (legitimate) vs prompt-driven (fixable).
Block rate dropped 15%→4%. De-escalate from 'monitor' to 'observe.' Re-investigate only if it climbs above 10%.
